pyramid.en: We visited the great pyramid in Egypt.
pyramid.zh: 我們參觀了埃及的大金字塔。

qualify.en: She qualified for the final round.
qualify.zh: 她取得了進入決賽的資格。

quest.en: He set off on a quest for treasure.

quiver.zh: 她的聲音因激動而顫抖。

quota.en: The factory met its monthly quota.
quota.zh: 這家工廠達到了每月的配額。

racism.en: We should all stand against racism.
racism.zh: 我們都應該反對種族歧視。

rack.en: Hang your coat on the rack.
rack.zh: 把你的外套掛在架子上。

radical.zh: 他們提出了一個徹底的改變。

ragged.en: The poor man wore ragged clothes.
ragged.zh: 那個窮人穿著破爛的衣服。

raid.en: The police carried out a raid at dawn.
raid.zh: 警方在黎明發動了突襲。

rail.en: Hold the rail when you go down the stairs.

rally.zh: 成千上萬人加入了和平集會。

ranch.en: They raise cattle on a large ranch.
ranch.zh: 他們在一座大牧場養牛。

random.en: She picked a random card from the deck.
random.zh: 她從牌堆隨機抽了一張牌。

ratio.en: The ratio of boys to girls is one to one.

rational.en: She made a calm and rational choice.
rational.zh: 她做了一個冷靜又理性的選擇。

realism.en: The painting is famous for its realism.

realm.en: She is an expert in the realm of science.

rear.en: The exit is at the rear of the bus.

reassure.en: He reassured her that all was well.

rebellion.en: The people rose up in rebellion.

recession.en: Many shops closed during the recession.
recession.zh: 經濟衰退期間許多商店倒閉。

recipient.en: She was the recipient of the award.
recipient.zh: 她是這個獎項的得獎者。

recite.en: He recited the poem from memory.
recite.zh: 他憑記憶背誦了那首詩。

recommend.en: I recommend this book to everyone.
recommend.zh: 我向每個人推薦這本書。

recommendation.en: She gave me a good recommendation.
recommendation.zh: 她給了我一個很好的推薦。

recruit.en: The team recruited two new players.
recruit.zh: 這支隊伍招募了兩名新球員。

refuge.en: They took refuge from the storm in a cave.
refuge.zh: 他們在洞穴裡躲避暴風雨。

regardless.en: She kept trying regardless of the risk.
regardless.zh: 不管風險如何，她仍持續嘗試。

regime.en: The old regime was finally replaced.

rehearsal.en: The band had a rehearsal before the show.

reinforce.en: They reinforced the bridge with steel.
reinforce.zh: 他們用鋼材加固了這座橋。

reminder.en: I set a reminder on my phone.
reminder.zh: 我在手機上設了一個提醒。

removal.en: The removal of the old tree took hours.
removal.zh: 移除那棵老樹花了好幾個小時。

render.en: The injury rendered him unable to walk.

rental.en: The car rental costs fifty dollars a day.

repay.en: He promised to repay the loan soon.
repay.zh: 他承諾很快會還清貸款。

republican.en: He holds republican views on government.
republican.zh: 他對政府抱持共和主義的看法。

resemblance.en: There is a strong resemblance between them.
resemblance.zh: 他們之間有很強的相似之處。

reservoir.en: The city gets water from a reservoir.
reservoir.zh: 這座城市的水來自水庫。

residence.en: This is the official residence of the mayor.

resident.en: Every resident of the building helped.
resident.zh: 這棟大樓的每位住戶都幫了忙。

residential.en: They live in a quiet residential area.
residential.zh: 他們住在一個安靜的住宅區。

resort.en: We stayed at a beach resort.
resort.zh: 我們住在一間海濱度假村。

respondent.en: Most respondents liked the new plan.
respondent.zh: 大多數受訪者喜歡這個新計畫。

resume.en: They resumed the game after the rain.

retail.en: She works in the retail business.

revenue.en: The shop's revenue grew last year.
revenue.zh: 這家店去年的營收成長了。

reverse.en: He reversed the car into the garage.

rhetoric.en: His speech was full of clever rhetoric.
rhetoric.zh: 他的演講充滿巧妙的修辭。

rib.en: He hurt a rib when he fell.
rib.zh: 他跌倒時傷了一根肋骨。

ridge.en: We hiked along the mountain ridge.

rigid.en: The rules here are very rigid.

rim.en: She wiped the rim of the cup.

riot.en: A riot broke out in the city.
riot.zh: 城市裡爆發了一場暴動。

rip.en: He ripped the letter in half.

risky.en: Climbing without a rope is risky.

ritual.en: Lighting candles is part of the ritual.
ritual.zh: 點蠟燭是這個儀式的一部分。

rival.en: The two teams are old rivals.

rod.en: He fixed the curtain with a metal rod.
rod.zh: 他用一根金屬桿固定窗簾。

sacred.en: The mountain is sacred to the local people.
sacred.zh: 這座山對當地人來說是神聖的。

saddle.en: She climbed onto the horse's saddle.

saint.en: The church is named after a saint.
saint.zh: 這座教堂以一位聖人命名。

salmon.en: We had grilled salmon for dinner.

salon.en: She got her hair done at the salon.

sandal.en: She wore sandals to the beach.

scan.en: The doctor did a scan of his brain.
scan.zh: 醫生為他的大腦做了掃描。

scandal.en: The scandal shocked the whole town.
scandal.zh: 這起醜聞震驚了整個城鎮。

scar.en: He has a small scar on his arm.

scenario.en: Imagine a scenario where you win.
scenario.zh: 想像一個你獲勝的情境。

scent.en: The dog followed the scent of the fox.

scheme.en: They came up with a clever scheme.
scheme.zh: 他們想出了一個巧妙的方案。

scope.en: The project is large in scope.

scramble.en: The kids scrambled up the hill.
scramble.zh: 孩子們手腳並用爬上山丘。

scrap.en: He saved scraps of paper for notes.

script.en: The actors learned the script by heart.
script.zh: 演員們把劇本背得滾瓜爛熟。

sector.en: She works in the public sector.

seminar.en: She gave a seminar on writing.
seminar.zh: 她舉辦了一場關於寫作的研討會。

senator.en: The senator voted for the new law.
senator.zh: 這位參議員投票贊成新法律。

sensation.en: She felt a warm sensation in her hands.
sensation.zh: 她的手感覺到一陣暖意。

sensitivity.en: He treats the topic with sensitivity.
sensitivity.zh: 他以細膩的態度處理這個話題。

sensor.en: The light has a motion sensor.
sensor.zh: 這盞燈有個動作感應器。

sentiment.zh: 這張卡片表達了親切的情感。

sentimental.en: She kept the letter for sentimental reasons.
sentimental.zh: 她因情感因素留著那封信。

sequence.en: Follow the steps in the right sequence.
sequence.zh: 按正確的順序進行這些步驟。

series.en: She is reading a series of fantasy books.
series.zh: 她正在讀一套奇幻小說。

server.en: The website is hosted on a fast server.
server.zh: 這個網站架在一台快速的伺服器上。

session.en: We had a long practice session today.

setting.en: The story's setting is a small village.
setting.zh: 這個故事的背景是個小村莊。

shareholder.en: Each shareholder owns part of the company.
shareholder.zh: 每位股東都擁有公司的一部分。

shatter.en: The glass shattered on the floor.

shed.en: He keeps his tools in a garden shed.
shed.zh: 他把工具放在花園的小屋裡。

sheer.en: It was sheer luck that we found it.
sheer.zh: 我們能找到它純粹是運氣。

sheriff.en: The sheriff kept order in the town.

shiver.en: She shivered in the cold wind.

shortage.en: There was a water shortage in summer.
shortage.zh: 夏天發生了缺水的情形。

shove.en: Don't shove others in the line.

shrug.en: He shrugged and said he didn't know.

shuttle.en: A shuttle bus runs to the airport.
shuttle.zh: 有一班接駁車開往機場。

siege.en: The castle was under siege for weeks.
siege.zh: 這座城堡被圍困了好幾週。

skeleton.en: We saw a dinosaur skeleton at the museum.
skeleton.zh: 我們在博物館看到了恐龍骨架。

slam.en: She slammed the door in anger.

slap.en: He gave the table a playful slap.
slap.zh: 他開玩笑地拍了一下桌子。

slavery.zh: 他們為了終結奴隸制度而奮鬥。

slot.en: Put the coin in the slot.

smog.zh: 濃濃的霧霾籠罩著城市。

snatch.zh: 一個小偷搶走了她的包包。

sneak.en: He tried to sneak out of the house.

sniff.en: The dog sniffed at the box.

soak.en: Soak the beans overnight before cooking.

soar.en: The eagle soared high in the sky.

sob.en: The child sobbed after the fall.
sob.zh: 那個孩子跌倒後啜泣起來。

sober.en: He stayed sober at the party.
sober.zh: 派對上他沒喝酒，保持清醒。

sole.en: She was the sole survivor of the crash.
sole.zh: 她是這場事故唯一的生還者。

solo.zh: 她獨唱了一首優美的歌。

sophisticated.en: The phone has a sophisticated design.
sophisticated.zh: 這支手機有精巧的設計。

sophomore.en: He is a sophomore in high school.

souvenir.en: I bought a souvenir from the trip.
souvenir.zh: 我從旅行買了一個紀念品。

sovereignty.zh: 這個國家捍衛它的主權。

sow.en: Farmers sow seeds in the spring.

spacious.en: Their new house is bright and spacious.
spacious.zh: 他們的新房子又明亮又寬敞。

sparkle.en: The diamonds sparkled in the light.
sparkle.zh: 鑽石在燈光下閃閃發亮。

specialist.zh: 她去看了心臟科專科醫生。

specialize.en: This shop specializes in old books.

specialty.zh: 海鮮是這位主廚的拿手好菜。

specify.en: Please specify the time and place.
specify.zh: 請明確指出時間和地點。

specimen.en: The scientist studied a leaf specimen.
specimen.zh: 科學家研究了一片葉子標本。

spectrum.en: A rainbow shows the spectrum of colors.
spectrum.zh: 彩虹呈現出色彩的光譜。

sphere.en: A basketball is shaped like a sphere.

spine.en: Good posture keeps your spine healthy.
spine.zh: 良好的姿勢讓你的脊椎健康。

sponge.en: She wiped the table with a sponge.

sponsor.en: A local company sponsored the team.
sponsor.zh: 一家當地公司贊助了這支隊伍。

sponsorship.en: The event received sponsorship from a bank.
sponsorship.zh: 這個活動獲得了一家銀行的贊助。

spouse.en: You may bring your spouse to the party.
spouse.zh: 你可以帶你的配偶來派對。

squash.en: They play squash at the gym.

squat.en: He squatted down to pet the cat.

stability.en: The country enjoys peace and stability.
stability.zh: 這個國家享有和平與穩定。

stack.en: She put a stack of books on the desk.

stain.en: There is a coffee stain on his shirt.
stain.zh: 他的襯衫上有個咖啡漬。

stall.en: We bought fruit at a market stall.
stall.zh: 我們在市場攤位買了水果。

stance.en: She took a firm stance on the issue.
stance.zh: 她對這個議題採取堅定的立場。

startle.en: The sudden noise startled the cat.

statistical.zh: 這份報告包含統計數據。

steer.en: She steered the boat toward the shore.

stereotype.zh: 我們應該避免相信刻板印象。

stew.en: She made a warm beef stew.
stew.zh: 她做了一鍋溫熱的燉牛肉。

stimulate.en: Bright colors stimulate a baby's mind.
stimulate.zh: 鮮豔的顏色能刺激寶寶的大腦。

stimulus.en: Music can be a stimulus for creativity.
stimulus.zh: 音樂可以是創意的刺激。

stock.en: The store has plenty of milk in stock.
stock.zh: 這家店有充足的牛奶庫存。

storage.en: We rented a storage room for our boxes.
storage.zh: 我們租了一間倉庫放箱子。

straighten.en: Please straighten the chairs in a row.

straightforward.en: The instructions were simple and straightforward.
